appDescription.message: Blur sensitive text, images, and videos on any webpage with keyboard shortcuts or an element picker.

pickerPrefixLabel.description: Static prefix label that reads as one sentence with the chip mode label. May be empty in locales where the sentence-fragment grammar doesn't carry.

pickerChipDescDynamic.message: Tap an element on the page to blur it. The blur follows that item. Click to switch mode.

pickerChipDescStickyPage.message: Sketch a box over a region of the page. Scrolls with the content. Click to switch mode.

pickerChipDescStickyScreen.message: Sketch a box fixed to your screen. Stays put when you scroll — great for screen-sharing. Click to switch mode.

pickerClearBtnTip.message: Remove all blur from this page
